member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IParallelTasksService.ParallelAction(System.Action)
member.summary: Returns a prime Action for parallel activity (Task.Factory.StartNew method or TPL).
member.param: An Action delegate to execute asynchronously.

member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IParallelTasksService.ParallelAction``1(System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Returns a prime Action for parallel activity (Task.Factory.StartNew method or TPL).
member.typeparam: The type of the result available through the Task.
member.param: An Action delegate to execute asynchronously.

member.name: M:Prime.ParallelTasksService.IParallelTasksService.ParallelFunc``1(System.Func{System.Object,``0})
member.summary: Returns a Prime Func for parallel activity (Task.Factory.StartNew method or TPL).
member.typeparam: The type of the result available through the Task.
member.param: A function delegate that returns the future result to be available through the .
